---
title: "uplink.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/cstar/core/uplink.py"
loc: 66
complexity: 5
logic_score: 3.23
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 6.25
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating AntigravityUplink, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 49 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `AntigravityUplink`
- `__init__`
- `send_payload`
- `_transmit_socket`
- `_spinner`
- `query_bridge`
